item.title: Trump 100% Pharma Tariffs
item.description:
• Summary: Former President Trump has signed an order imposing 100% tariffs on imported pharmaceuticals from countries without trade deals, with several exemptions. This policy aims to boost domestic manufacturing but may affect drug supply chains and pricing, with reports detailing the potential impacts and exceptions.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma, Endpoints News, Stat News

item.title: US-UK Pharma Trade Deal
item.description:
• Summary: The UK government has secured a trade deal with the US that ensures zero tariffs on pharmaceuticals, as part of efforts to re-attract investment and strengthen post-Brexit trade relations in the biopharma sector.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma

item.title: Drug Price Negotiations
item.description:
• Summary: Drugmakers are engaging in negotiations with the White House to reach deals on drug prices, which could influence future pricing strategies under current regulatory frameworks and address cost concerns.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Stat News
